capability_summary.can: Compose a GA loop from tournament selection + two-point crossover + bit-flip mutation, reaching >=6/8 on OneMax in 20 generations with pop=20 from a fixed seed.
capability_summary.cannot: Does not provide parallelism or GPU acceleration out of the box; large populations are slow relative to evotorch.
